primary_function: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).
suggested_aec_gates: Verify implementation follows four-phase workflow: research, implementation, review, evaluation
Confirm TypeScript projects use recommended stack with streamable HTTP transport
Ensure tools have clear, action-oriented naming with consistent prefixes
Validate proper schema definition using Zod for TypeScript or Pydantic for Python
Check that error messages are actionable with specific suggestions
Verify comprehensive API coverage is prioritized over limited workflow tools
Confirm evaluation includes 10 independent, read-only, complex questions
Ensure proper tool annotations (readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, etc.) are included
Validate structured content and output schemas are defined where applicable
trigger_text: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).
